query:
UPDATE order_tracking ot
JOIN (
  SELECT 
    s.transactionId,
    COUNT(p.id) AS pallet_count
  FROM qc_scan_sessions s
  JOIN qc_pallets p ON p.sessionId = s.id AND p.deletedAt IS NULL
  WHERE s.status = 'complete'
    AND s.transactionId IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY s.transactionId
) pq ON ot.extensivOrderId = pq.transactionId
SET ot.palletCount = pq.pallet_count
WHERE ot.lifecycleStatus IN ('ship_ready', 'shipped')
  AND (ot.palletCount IS NULL OR ot.palletCount = 0);

UPDATE order_tracking ot
JOIN (

    s.transactionId,
    COUNT(p.id) AS pallet_count
  FROM qc_scan_sessions s
  JOIN qc_pallets p ON p.sessionId = s.id AND p.deletedAt IS NULL
  WHERE s.status = 'complete'
    AND s.transactionId IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY s.transactionId
) pq ON ot.extensivOrderId = pq.transactionId
SET ot.palletCount = pq.pallet_count
WHERE ot.lifecycleStatus IN ('ship_ready', 'shipped')
  AND (ot.palletCount IS NULL OR ot.palletCount = 0);
